_instructions.scopus: For Scopus: add your API key and Author ID (found in your Scopus profile URL)
_instructions.openAlex: Alternative: use OpenAlex ID or ORCID (free, no API key required)
_instructions.priority: If Scopus credentials are provided, Scopus is used first. Otherwise OpenAlex is used as fallback.

_how_to_find_scopus_author_id: 4. The Author ID is in the URL: scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=XXXXXXXX
_fallback_static_data_comment: If no API works, this static data will be used:
